tool.name: IMAGINE-X subhkl Peak Indexing

param.name: kiVec
param.label: Incident Beam Vector
param.help: As a comma-separated list of numbers (eg '0,0,-1'

param.name: goniometerAxes
param.label: Goniometer Axes List
param.help: (Optional) Comma separated list of goniometer axes. Leave blank to not refine any axis.

param.name: refineDetectorBanks
param.label: Refine Detector Banks
param.help: As a comma-separated list of numerical bank IDs (eg 1,2,3)

param.name: detectorModes
param.label: Detector modes
param.help: Comma-separated list of refinement modes (e.g. radial,global_rot,independent)

param.name: bootstrap
param.label: Bootstrap file to restart refinement from

tool.help: Calculates peak indices in reciprocol space.
